title: A City Forum Clip
subtitle: 六级示范课
summary: 使用外部视频文件绑定的一节六级阶段练习，主题是城市交通与公共讨论。

sentences.en: The forum begins with a short report on morning traffic in the city.
sentences.zh: 论坛先用一段简短报告介绍了这座城市的早高峰交通。

sentences.en: Several speakers argue that safer bike lanes could change daily habits.
sentences.zh: 几位发言者认为，更安全的自行车道会改变人们的日常出行习惯。

sentences.en: Others point out that better buses are still necessary for outer districts.
sentences.zh: 另一些人指出，对于外缘城区来说，更完善的公交系统仍然必不可少。

sentences.en: By the end, the audience is invited to submit practical suggestions online.
sentences.zh: 在结束前，主办方邀请观众在线提交切实可行的建议。
